Years of experience in air conditioning installation, AHU modification, and exhaust fan systems.
Specialized in HVAC ducting, volume damper supply & installation, and ceiling reconditioning.
Highly trained professionals delivering quality results on hotel and commercial building projects.
QUALITY - PT. Prisma Cahaya Lestari
INNOVATION - PT. Prisma Cahaya Lestari
